executive_summary: Build workflow dispatch failed due to workflow file not found (HTTP 404). The GitHub Actions workflow file at .github/workflows/build.yml is either missing, inaccessible, or Actions are disabled on the repository. This is a critical configuration error preventing any build execution.

errors.title: Workflow File Not Found - GitHub Actions Dispatch Failed
errors.description: The GitHub Actions workflow dispatch endpoint returned HTTP 404 Not Found when attempting to trigger the build.yml workflow. This indicates the workflow file does not exist at the expected path or is not accessible.
errors.error_message: HTTP Error 404: Not Found. Workflow dispatch endpoint returned 404. Possible causes: token missing workflow/actions permissions, workflow not accessible on this repo/branch, or Actions disabled. dispatch_url=https://api.github.com/repos/loginkarun/scib_demo/actions/workflows/.github%2Fworkflows%2Fbuild.yml/dispatches response_body={
errors.root_cause: The workflow file .github/workflows/build.yml does not exist in the repository at the specified branch (main), or GitHub Actions is disabled, or the authentication token lacks necessary permissions (workflow/actions scope).
errors.impact: Complete build pipeline failure. No builds can be executed until the workflow file is created or permissions are corrected. This blocks all CI/CD automation including compilation, testing, and deployment.

errors.title: Missing GitHub Actions Workflow Configuration
errors.description: The repository lacks the required GitHub Actions workflow configuration file that defines the build pipeline steps, Maven execution, and CI/CD automation.
errors.error_message: Workflow file not found - Final attempt failure
errors.root_cause: The .github/workflows/ directory is either missing or does not contain a build.yml file with proper workflow definition. This could be due to: (1) workflow file never created, (2) incorrect file path/name, (3) file deleted accidentally, or (4) branch does not have the workflow file.
errors.impact: No automated build process available. Manual intervention required to create workflow file with Maven build steps, test execution, and artifact generation. Prevents continuous integration and automated quality checks.

errors.title: GitHub Actions API Authentication or Permission Issue
errors.description: The GitHub API token may lack the required 'workflow' or 'actions' permissions needed to dispatch workflow events, or GitHub Actions may be disabled at the repository or organization level.
errors.error_message: Possible causes: token missing workflow/actions permissions, workflow not accessible on this repo/branch, or Actions disabled
errors.root_cause: The authentication token used for API calls may not have the 'workflow' scope required to trigger GitHub Actions workflows. Alternatively, GitHub Actions may be disabled in repository settings or organization policies may restrict Actions usage.
errors.impact: Even if workflow file exists, builds cannot be triggered programmatically via API. This prevents automated build triggers from external systems, webhooks, or CI/CD orchestration tools. Requires token regeneration with proper scopes or enabling Actions in repository settings.

steps: 2. Create build.yml file with Maven build configuration
4. Configure Maven build steps: checkout, setup-java, mvn clean install
5. Add test execution and artifact upload steps
6. Commit and push to main branch
1. Check current token scopes in GitHub Settings > Developer settings > Personal access tokens
3. If missing, regenerate token with required scopes
5. Verify GitHub Actions is enabled in repository Settings > Actions > General

compliance_notes.audit_trail: Build failure logged at attempt 3. No workflow execution occurred due to missing workflow file. Error classification: CONFIGURATION_ERROR. Severity: CRITICAL. Remediation required before any build can proceed.
compliance_notes.security_impact: No security vulnerabilities introduced by this error. However, lack of automated builds prevents security scanning and vulnerability detection in CI/CD pipeline.
compliance_notes.regulatory_compliance: Build automation failure may impact compliance requirements for continuous testing and quality assurance in regulated environments (SOC2, ISO 27001).
